  1. uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource

Uses of Package
uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource

Packages that use uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi.agi
Provides model-agnostic, intelligent configuration objects for agi sessions.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource
Provides the V2 Universal Resource Pipeline (URP) infrastructure.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource.handle
Low-level connectivity and metadata abstraction for resources.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.resource.view
Managed viewports and stateful data interpretation for resources.
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool
Provides the core framework for defining, managing, and executing local Java tools.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.ui.render
Provides the visual rendering layer for agentic file write operations within NetBeans.
uno.anahata.asi.nb.ui.resources
Provides the visual and interactive layer for NetBeans-specific resource handles.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.context
Provides components and hierarchical models for the ASI Context Explorer.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part.tool.param
Provides specialized renderers for individual tool parameters.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.resources
Provides UI components for managing and interacting with multimodal resources.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.resources.view
Provides specialized UI components for viewing and editing managed resources.

    The next-generation V2 Resource Manager.

    Description

    Defines the refresh policy for a Resource when its content is provided to the model via the Augmented Workspace.
